title: ModernPojav
description: A simple, modern modpack for PojavLauncher. Intended to be hosted on a separate server and connected to from low-spce devices.
body:
I've been trying to find a modern, barebones MC modpack for [PojavLauncher](https://pojavlauncherteam.github.io/) that _actually works_, but have had trouble finding one that fit my needs. Thus ModernPojav was born.

This **just** got approved, so I still need to test on the gcloud to make sure it works as expected.

This pack is intended to run on a standalone server for your low-spec, Pojav-running device to connect to, though I'm sure you could run this all on a high spec'd Android device too. I am primarily testing from my Logitech G Cloud handheld.

Right now I will leave this pack barebones and possibly create an optional modpack with things that actually change gameplay, but that may change.

This appears to give relatively stable 30fps on my G Cloud using:

- Separate pc hosting the server
- Setting client graphics to:
  - fast
  - 30fps
  - 7 chunk distance
  - 5 simulation distance
  - no clouds

If you've got questions/suggestions/etc., join the discord channel!
